items.prompt: Abstract infographic illustration of an expanding security attack surface in the AI era. A central circular core in deep navy blue represents traditional software supply chain. From this core, multiple radiating tendrils and expanding concentric rings in green #20A675 spread outward, representing new AI-era risk vectors: open-source LLMs, MCP toolchains, AI agent plugins, model weight files. The outermost rings are fragmented and glowing in blue #6096E6 with gold #FFC000 warning dots, symbolizing the dramatically expanded attack surface. Clean geometric style, flat vector aesthetic, professional government-tech tone. White background on the left side for text placement. No text, no labels, no characters. Pure abstract data visualization style.
